text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm. And so, the rescue scene ends in failure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh heh! Ah, yes, I knew it. I knew it all
along!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A theatrical twist! You desired to compose a
tragedy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You've flown too close to the sun that is I and,
thus, have lost your wings! A brilliant metaphor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, you poor souls behind this glass! Forgive my
corruptible radiance!
